dj_text: Okay so Bossy happened. Now 100 Million (Main) happens. Life comes at you fast.

hijack_text: Attention all bingo fans in Kosmos B-12!
recovery_text: We're back. That was NOT a crossover event. That was a dimensional bleed.
title: 100 Million (Main)
